name: Reflection Engine
description: Applies reflection rules to batch-error analysis. Reclassifies target errors as self-errors when the agent itself is the common factor. Creates self-tasks for approved self-healing.

tools.name: process-reflection.reclassify
tools.description: Analyze a set of error entries and apply reflection rules. Returns reclassification results.

entryIds.description: Specific entries to analyze. If omitted, analyzes all active target errors.
